title: IMD forecasts early monsoon onset over Kerala on May 26 - MSN
article_text:
Early arrival forecast: IMD expects the southwest monsoon to reach Kerala on May 26, with a ±4 day margin, ahead of the usual June 1 date.
Rainfall outlook: Seasonal rainfall is forecast to be below normal at around 80–92% of the long-period average, linked to likely El Niño development.
National significance: Monsoon onset is critical for agriculture, water resources, and easing summer heat across India.
